task_completion.description: Navigate to the Manage fields page for the Default order item type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the Drupal admin interface showing the 'Manage fields' page specifically for the 'Default' Order item type (typically found under Commerce > Configuration > Orders > Order item types).

task_completion.description: Configure a new text field labeled 'Engraving Message'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the 'Add field' page where a new field is being created, showing a text-based field type (e.g., Text (plain)) selected and 'Engraving Message' entered as the label.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Engraving Message' field is added to the Default order item type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the 'Manage fields' page of the Default order item type, showing the newly created 'Engraving Message' field in the table of existing fields.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Add to cart' form display settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the 'Manage form display' page of the Default order item type. Crucially, the 'Add to cart' secondary tab or form mode must be selected and active.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Engraving Message' field on the 'Add to cart' form display
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the 'Engraving Message' field positioned in the active region (above the 'Disabled' section) on the 'Add to cart' form display settings page, indicating it will be visible to customers.

integrity.description: Agent used the Drupal web interface to configure the fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent navigating through the Drupal admin UI in a web browser rather than using terminal commands like `drush` or editing YAML configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application in a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show a standard web browser displaying the Drupal site, not a text editor, script output, or automated testing tool interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not manipulate the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent did not use a database management tool (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) to modify the database records directly to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target entity type is 'commerce_order_item' and the target bundle is 'default'. The expected field label must contain 'Engraving' (specifically 'Engraving Message'). The target form mode to be configured is 'add_to_cart', which is a specific form display mode in Drupal Commerce used for product add-to-cart forms. The agent must use the Drupal admin UI to add the field to the default order item type and enable it on the add_to_cart form display.
